/usr/local/cuda-11.2/bin/nvcc -forward-unknown-to-host-compiler -Xcompiler=-fPIC -Wno-deprecated-gpu-targets -shared -dlink CMakeFiles/tf_sampling.dir/tf_sampling.cu.o CMakeFiles/tf_sampling.dir/tf_sampling.cpp.o -o CMakeFiles/tf_sampling.dir/cmake_device_link.o   -L/home/yhlever/anaconda3/envs/AMSMC/lib/python3.8/site-packages/tensorflow  -L/usr/local/cuda-11.2/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs  -L/usr/local/cuda-11.2/targets/x86_64-linux/lib  -L/home/yhlever/DeepLearning/AMSMC/tf_ops/build/open3d_root/open3d_install/lib  -lcudart -ltensorflow_framework -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
